modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Laptop display not waking up from sleep mode.

full_description_text: User has laptop with Windows 10. Screen visibility is very poor at startup. They must restart the laptop to wake it from sleep. Also, user mentioned issues with monitors and scanner setup.
short_description: Laptop display not waking up from sleep mode.
description: User has laptop with Windows 10. Screen visibility is very poor at startup. They must restart the laptop to wake it from sleep. Also, user mentioned issues with monitors and scanner setup.
